attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT NET_REVENUE_ID, 
SCHEDULE_LINE_ID, 
ASSOCIATION_TYPE, 
GL_DATE, 
GL_POSTED_DATE, 
AMOUNT, 
ACCTD_AMOUNT, 
ACCTD_AMOUNT_USD, 
CURRENCY_CODE, 
CODE_COMBINATION_ID, 
HEADER_ID, 
LINE_ID, 
CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, 
CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, 
INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
FISCAL_YEAR, 
FISCAL_MONTH, 
NCR_EXTRACTED_FLAG, 
RRR_EXTRACTED_FLAG, 
IC_VT_EXTRACTED_FLAG, 
ORG_ID, 
CONTEXT, 
ATTRIBUTE1, 
ATTRIBUTE2, 
ATTRIBUTE3, 
ATTRIBUTE4, 
ATTRIBUTE5, 
ATTRIBUTE6, 
ATTRIBUTE7, 
ATTRIBUTE8, 
ATTRIBUTE9, 
ATTRIBUTE10, 
ATTRIBUTE11, 
ATTRIBUTE12, 
ATTRIBUTE13, 
ATTRIBUTE14, 
ATTRIBUTE15, 
ATTRIBUTE16, 
ATTRIBUTE17, 
ATTRIBUTE18, 
ATTRIBUTE19, 
ATTRIBUTE20, 
CREATED_BY, 
CREATION_DATE, 
LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
SOURCE_DML_TYPE, 
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, 
REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$NRTACCUMVWDB.BV_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE
WHERE SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND   SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BV_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE.NET_REVENUE_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
